purpose: Generate a polished 2D wellness avatar while preserving the uploaded person's recognizable likeness as much as the image model allows.
promptTemplate: Create a polished 2D wellness avatar of the same person shown in the reference photo.
Preserve recognizable identity and likeness: face shape, hair color, hair style, skin tone, age impression, eyewear, facial hair if present, head angle, pose, framing, and natural expression.
Do not invent a new person. Do not beautify into a different face. Do not change hairstyle, hair length, glasses, facial proportions, or defining visible features.
Use the uploaded photo as the source of truth for structure, composition, and personal features.
Render as a clean healthcare-friendly 2D avatar with soft lighting, healthy skin texture, natural smile or neutral friendly expression, and premium event-card polish.
Keep the background simple and card-friendly. No text, no logos, no diagnosis, no medical equipment.

stabilityControlStructure.reason: Higher structure control and no aggressive style preset should reduce identity drift for expo selfies.

stabilityStyleTransfer.reason: Keep the user's composition and likeness stronger than the reference style.

stabilityStyleGuide.reason: Use Style Guide as a conservative fallback, not as a heavy restyle.

operatorNotes: If outputs still do not resemble the uploaded person, lower style influence before changing providers.
Do not add marketing copy to the avatar prompt; final text belongs in the print-composer frame.
For maximum likeness, the booth photo should be front-facing, well-lit, and include one person only.
